chain: plasma and surface state not modeled here

deposition_thickness.label: Passivation added per cycle
deposition_thickness.meaning: Changes the protective layer added before the next etch phase.

etch_time.label: Etch phase time per cycle
etch_time.meaning: Changes the etch dose applied during every cycle.

ion_rate.label: Directional removal strength
ion_rate.meaning: Scales removal driven by simulated ions.

ion_source_exponent.label: Ion arrival directionality
ion_source_exponent.meaning: Higher values concentrate simulated ion arrival toward the surface normal.

neutral_rate.label: Neutral removal strength
neutral_rate.meaning: Scales removal driven by simulated neutral particles.

neutral_sticking_probability.label: Neutral surface-reaction probability
neutral_sticking_probability.meaning: Changes whether a neutral particle reacts or reflects.

decision.next_required_evidence: interior reduced response surface followed by 2,000-ray independent confirmation

scope: Exact 500-ray discovery cases. They identify coupled failure regions; they do not define a machine recipe or confirmed process window.
title: Dry-etch interactions
